title: `Azzan #5821
definition:
Azzan = "very strong"

 1) father of Paltiel prince of the tribe of Issachar who represented
    his tribe in the division of the promised land
nasbUsage:
Definition: Azzan = "very strong"

 1) father of Paltiel prince of the tribe of Issachar who represented
    his tribe in the division of the promised land

    NASB:  strong, a man of Issachar
